negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: common_sense_b2507f85-47b2-4fca-9a49-d555130fdd2b
prompt: A woman is seen from behind walking down a picturesque cobblestone street flanked by historic buildings. The scene opens with a low-angle, wide shot, set up at the entrance of a narrow alley. The alleyway extends with a narrow stone path between traditional buildings, showcasing a mix of textures, including smooth stone and rough brick. On the right, a window with dark brown rails on the ground floor reflects the opposite side, accompanied by a narrow, dark brown door with a golden knob and a silver handle, along with a letterbox on its right. Further up, there are other doors and windows on different floors, revealing the intricate architectural details of the buildings.  Close to the camera on the left, a vertically aligned black pipe with some posters stuck to it stands out, alongside a distribution of different small pipes behind the main pipe. As the camera tilts up, the woman is seen from behind, walking steadily down the street. She is wearing a wide-brimmed straw hat, a colorful long skirt with geometric patterns in red and blue, and a black backpack. The street is devoid of vehicles, allowing her to stroll unobstructed towards the end of the alley.  The sun casts bright light onto the building at the end of the alley, highlighting its intricate architectural details, including multiple spires and ornate facades. The building is predominantly off-white with a square base and grey-colored roofs, featuring a lantern tower at the center. Flags are seen waving in the breeze atop the building in the background, and other pedestrians are walking in the distance. As she approaches the end of the street, the camera centers on the towering spire of the building, with the lighting adjusted to focus on the details of the structure.
